notes: Component Firmware Audit (v3.8.0): full SP/BMC, shelf module, disk/DQP, StorageGRID, and E-Series firmware audit panels in the Technical Audit tab. QBR and MSP Service Report now include a Component Firmware Currency metric (SP/BMC + shelf systems at recommended level). Shelf firmware badge logic corrected — catalog-backfilled shelves consistently show ✓ Est. Current instead of Catalog ref. Fleet-latest override suppressed for catalog shelves in server.py to prevent false drift. Capacity chart Y-axis auto-scales to prevent compressed display.
